items.title: Solana Institute-backed super PAC pours $8 million against Sherrod Brown in Ohio race
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant financial backing in political campaigns indicates growing influence and visibility for Solana, which could enhance its ecosystem's legitimacy.

items.title: Solana Policy Institute-backed PAC spends millions to jam Sherrod Brown's Senate run
items.whyYouShouldCare: The substantial spending by the PAC highlights Solana's commitment to shaping policy, potentially affecting regulatory environments that impact its ecosystem.

items.title: Solana’s usage booms as price stays range-bound: How soon can SOL catch up?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased usage of Solana despite price stagnation suggests strong underlying demand, which may lead to future price appreciation as the ecosystem expands.
